metadata.description: Agent skills for BIRD routing daemon configuration, editor setup, and CI/CD workflows.

plugins.name: bird-agent
plugins.description: Write, validate, format, and debug BIRD (BIRD1/2/3) routing daemon configuration files.

plugins.name: birdcc-installer
plugins.description: Install BIRD editor support and the birdcc command-line toolkit.

plugins.name: birdcc-cicd
plugins.description: Add the setup-birdcc GitHub Action to CI/CD workflows.
